global_description: A small, slender songbird with a streaked brown and white plumage. It has a short, conical bill and a distinctive yellowish eyebrow stripe. The wings and tail are brown with darker streaks, and the underparts are white with brown streaks.

part_details.head: Small, rounded with a yellowish eyebrow stripe and a short, conical bill.
part_details.wings: Brown with darker streaks, medium length.
part_details.tail: Short, brown with streaks, slightly forked.
part_details.underparts: White with brown streaks, smooth texture.
part_details.plumage: Overall streaked brown and white, providing camouflage.

spatial_relations: The yellowish eyebrow stripe runs above the eye.
The short bill is positioned at the front of the head.
The wings are attached to the sides of the body.
The tail extends from the rear of the body.
